title: Caesar Cipher Part 1: Decoding
body: Practice decoding Caesar ciphers manually. Try shifting letters through the alphabet following the instructions.
lesson: 1A Caesar Cipher Part 1: Decoding, 1B Caesar Cipher Part 2: Encoding, 4A Rail Fence Cipher Part 1: Pattern Recognition, 4B Rail Fence Cipher Part 2: Pattern Recognition, 5A Revision 1: Mixed Challenge, 5B Revision 2: Mixed Challenge
